file: 1041_Xing 等 - 2017 - One-step hydroprocessing of fatty acids into renewable aromatic hydrocarbons over NiHZSM-5 insight.txt

experiments.description: 在Ni/HZSM-5催化剂上，于360°C和4 MPa氢气压力下，对脂肪酸进行一步加氢处理12小时，生产可再生芳烃。该过程涉及加氢脱氧、加氢裂化和芳构化等多种反应。
experiments.text_snippet: The one-step hydroprocessing of fatty acids was conducted in a high-pressure autoclave... About 10 g feedstock and 0.6 g catalyst were added into the reactor... After 8 h reaction at a designated temperature (280 °C, 320 °C, 340 °C, 360 °C, and 380 °C)... The one-step hydroprocessing of fatty acids over Ni/HZSM-5 catalysts... A yield of B64% AHCs was obtained by hydroprocessing 10 g fatty acids in the presence of 0.6 g catalyst comprising 10 wt% Ni/HZSM-5 with a Si/Al ratio of 25 for 12 h at 360 °C and 4 MPa H₂.

Feedstock.original: Fatty acids (composition: Palmitic acid 8.36 wt%, Stearic acid 3.59 wt%, Oleic acid 67.20 wt%, Linoleic acid 13.67 wt%, Linolenic acid 2.87 wt%, Eicosenoic acid 4.31 wt%)

Catalyst composition.original: Ni nanoparticles on HZSM-5 zeolite support (Si/Al ratios: 25, 80, 120, 150, 200; Ni loadings: 5 wt%, 10 wt%, 12.5 wt%, 15 wt%)

Catalyst loading.original: 0.6 g catalyst per 10 g fatty acids

Product.original: Aromatic hydrocarbons (toluene, ethylbenzene, o-xylene, p-xylene, propylbenzene, 1-ethyl-2-methylbenzene), alkanes, olefins, cyclic hydrocarbons
